title: unexpected tikv coprocessor result of date_format
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
``` sql
CREATE TABLE `ts` (  `ct` time DEFAULT NULL); 
insert into ts(ct) values ('10:20:34'),('09:20:58'),('15:46:03');
select ct, date_format(ct, "%H%i%s") from ts where date_format(ct, "%H%i%s") = "182034";
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
empty result

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
``` sql
mysql>  select ct, date_format(ct, "%H%i%s") from ts where date_format(ct, "%H%i%s") = "182034";
+----------+---------------------------+
| ct       | date_format(ct, "%H%i%s") |
+----------+---------------------------+
| 10:20:34 | 102034                    |
+----------+---------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

nightly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `test_time` ( `id` INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, `event_time` TIME DEFAULT NULL, `description` VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_time(event_time, description) VALUES ('08:15:00', 'Morning Meeting'), ('12:30:45', 'Lunch Break'), ('18:45:30', 'Evening Wrap-up');
SELECT event_time, DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%H%i%s') FROM test_time WHERE DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%H%i%s') = '123045';
CREATE TABLE `test_null` ( `id` INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, `start_time` TIME DEFAULT NULL, `end_time` TIME DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_null(start_time, end_time) VALUES (NULL, '20:00:00'), ('14:00:00', NULL), (NULL, NULL);
